creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: Hmm.  td_oncpu offset within struct thread is not zero, so my guess about td being NULL is likely wrong, but then I have no clue what is NULL there.  Could you disassemble the instructions near the "instruction pointer" value, or at least show more of the stack trace from the panic message for the relative address, so that I could try do build the same kernel ad disassemble myself.
